item.title: Xiamen Kang Zhongyuan Biotechnology Co., Ltd.: MGC Health, Menthol- Cough Suppressant, Oral Anesthetic, Cough Drops, Honey Lemon, 30-count bag, Recall
item.company: Xiamen Kang Zhongyuan Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
item.brand: Xiamen Kang Zhongyuan Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
item.product: MGC Health, Menthol- Cough Suppressant, Oral Anesthetic, Cough Drops, Honey Lemon, 30-count bag,
item.summary: This recall is being initiated following FDA's recommendation based on certain observations noted during an August 15, 2025, inspection of the manufacturing facility that may bear on product quality. Product details: MGC Health, Menthol- Cough Suppressant, Oral Anesthetic, Cough Drops, Honey Lemon, 30-count bag, Distributed By: Medical Group Care, LLC, 1035 Collier Center Way, STE 5, Naples, FL 34110, NDC: 83698-114-30, UPC: 383173000047.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
